news-global-econ.description: A three-time deported illegal immigrant allegedly ran a stop sign and killed 6-year-old Calli Toler, igniting the border fight in North Carolina.

news-global-econ.description: An analysis found 136 of 140 Yamal LNG cargoes went to EU ports in early 2026, worth roughly $6.8 billion despite Europe's Russian gas phaseout pledge.

news-global-soc.description: A senior U.S. official says the USAID OIG investigation picked up where the U.N. failed, examining UNRWA staff links to terrorism beyond Oct. 7.
